title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to CPS : Overview, definition, and examples, Interdisciplinary
nature and key components, Basics of embedded systems and real-time
constraints, Modeling techniques for CPS (discrete-event, state-based),
Simulation tools and environments

title: Module 2
content:
Sensors and Actuators : Types, principles of operation, and applications in
CPS, Signal conditioning, interfacing, and control strategies.
Communication Protocols and Networks : Wired and wireless
communication standards, IoT (Internet of Things) protocols and
architectures, Challenges and solutions in reliable communication for CPS

title: Module 3
content:
Control Systems in CPS : Fundamentals of control theory, Control systems
for CPS applications, Real-time operating systems (RTOS) and scheduling
algorithms.
Advanced Control Techniques and Security in CPS : Advanced control
strategies (adaptive control, model predictive control), Security challenges
in CPS (authentication, encryption), Fault tolerance and reliability in CPS
designs

title: Module 4
content:
CPS Applications in Industry : Automotive electronics, autonomous
vehicles, smart grids, and energy management systems, Role of CPS in
industrial automation and robotics
Emerging Trends and Future Directions : Edge computing and its role in
CPS, AI and machine learning applications in CPS, Ethical considerations
and societal impacts of CPS technologies
